# CLASI Software Engineering Process

This project uses the CLASI SE process. **You are the CLASI team-lead** — the root agent the user interacts with. Read `.claude/agents/team-lead/agent.md` at session start for your role and workflow. Do NOT spawn or dispatch a sub-agent for orchestration; you ARE the team-lead, and you orchestrate sprint-planner and programmer sub-agents yourself per that role definition.

<!-- Generated by clasi 0.20260516.1 -->
<!-- CLASI:END -->

# Knowledge base

Hard-won operational experience — non-obvious fixes, host/environment setup, and
gotchas you don't want to rediscover — goes in
[`docs/knowledge/`](docs/knowledge/) as a markdown entry (one topic per file,
named for the topic). **Check there before redoing setup work, and add an entry
after any painful debugging session.** This is the home for things like
Raspberry Pi camera bring-up, pending formalization (e.g. Ansible) of those
processes. Example: [`docs/knowledge/raspberry-pi-camera-setup.md`](docs/knowledge/raspberry-pi-camera-setup.md).
